title: Where Is My Bus
description: A real-time bus tracking application that allows users to track public transport locations live. Built with Flutter for a smooth cross-platform mobile experience.

title: Social Media Application
description: A full-featured social platform featuring user authentication, post creation, and real-time interactions. Backend powered by Spring Boot with a robust TypeScript frontend.

title: Quiz Application
description: An interactive and engaging quiz platform with randomized questions, timed sessions, and detailed results analytics. Seamlessly deployed for reliable access.

title: FastAPI Social Media
description: A high-performance backend service for social media platforms focusing on speed and scalability. Implements RESTful principles with Python's FastAPI.

title: React Website
description: A modern, responsive website template showcasing best practices in component-based UI design and state management using the React framework.

title: 3D Portfolio Website
description: This very portfolio! A premium, interactive 3D showcase built with Three.js to demonstrate technical skills with an immersive user experience.
